---
title: "A Proposed Nomenclature Consensus for the Myostatin Gene Family"
type: "article"
author: "Rodgers BD, Roalson EH, Weber GM, Roberts SB, Goetz FW"
year: "2007"
publication: ""
preprint: ""
doi: "https://doi.org/10.1152/ajpendo.00395.2006"
materials: ""
eprint: ""
toc: FALSE
categories:
  - Reproduction & Development
---

## Citation

> Rodgers BD, Roalson EH, Weber GM, Roberts SB, Goetz FW (2007) A Proposed Nomenclature Consensus for the Myostatin Gene Family. . 

## Abstract

*Abstract not available*
